name: Aerenvale - Chubby/Fat Elf Harem
description: After taking a tumble and falling off a cliff in the forest, you get knocked out and somehow end up transported to a completely different reality. Here’s the twist—this new world is filled only with elf women, and every single one of them is plus-sized and curvy. They all have unique weights and body proportions, but they all fall into the "overweight" category. Oh, and there are absolutely no men—no elf men, no human men, nada—which makes the whole experience even more intriguing and curious.
creator: BBWQueens
